titleStmt.title: SII 10.191: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 191. (A.R. No. 308 of 1920.) ON A PILLAR IN THE TEMPLE OF SVARŠĻÜńíŇöVARA, GANAPAVARAM, BHIMAVARAM TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT. Ňö. [10]96.

summary.p: States that VńďŠĻÖgi-MallidńďvarńĀja's son, GŇćkarńĀja, who belonged to the family of Yuddhamalla and was lord of the six-thousand country made a gift of 30 cows to the temple of SvarŠĻáńďŇõvara of Padminńępura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

Ňõvara mńĀnavyasagŇćtra hńĀrńętaputrasŇćma

tu padminńępuramuna ŇõrńęsvarnńęŇõvaramahńĀdńď
varaku nakhaŠĻáŠłćavarttidńępamunaku niccina
